rationale: Drops the dead `User.deposit_total` column end-to-end, mirroring the careful pattern of pr231. New alembic revision `c0a5e1f93b27_drop_users_deposit_total.py` uses `op.batch_alter_table('users').drop_column('deposit_total')` with a symmetric downgrade that restores `Numeric(28, 8) DEFAULT 0` (with the V5-E-1 irreversible-data-loss warning documented in the docstring). `backend/app/models.py` deletes the `deposit_total` mapped column and tightens the `trust_deposit_balance` docstring to remove the `deposit_total` cross-reference. `backend/app/bot/sections.py` and `backend/app/bot/texts.py` re-source the deposit value from `trust_deposit_balance or 0` instead. `backend/app/routers/admin/users.py` `_to_detail` and `_to_list_item` no longer set `deposit_total`, the `Literal[..., 'deposit']` sort option is removed from the `sort` Query annotation, and the `deposit_min` filter on `routers/users.py` (along with its frontend `SearchFilterSheet` / `ActiveFilterChips` / `useUsers` references) are deleted. `frontend/openapi.json` and `src/api/openapi.generated.ts` are regenerated to drop the field from `AdminSetStatsIn`/`AdminUserListItem`/`AdminUserDetailOut`. The deleted test corresponds to a column that no longer exists (`test_h2_money_precision_widening.py`'s deposit_total round-trip). The test-relaxation / assertion-strip detector firings are false positives: removing a test for a removed column is the only correct schema-aligned action, identical reasoning to pr231.
